financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is planning to spend money to grow and improve how it operates.
They aim to produce more and move products better, but we don't know how much money they are making.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: High Risk
bullets: The company is facing challenges with unpredictable prices, making it hard to plan for the future.
New rules and weather problems are causing delays and could increase costs for their projects.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in taking care of the environment, but there's room for improvement.
Their efforts in social responsibility and management practices are decent, but not outstanding.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about future growth and financial health.
They used facts to address concerns and stayed positive even when questioned.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company clearly explained how it runs and treats its employees, using specific numbers and details.
They were less clear about future spending plans and pricing, often looking at past data instead of giving clear future directions.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing challenges in meeting demand and fixing infrastructure issues, which is a concern.
Even though there are some positive developments, the reduced interest in coal could be a problem for future growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Coal India is doing well in keeping production steady despite some challenges, but faces strong competition that could affect its market position.
The company is making smart moves by securing long-term deals with non-power sectors, which helps ensure steady income even with market changes.
